papers_mined.title: Float glass (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Molten glass on molten tin bath; density gradient causes glass to float and spread under gravity + surface tension; flat both sides without mechanical leveling.

papers_mined.title: The Float Process (Pilkington)
papers_mined.note: 1952 Pilkington invention; tin bath 50m × 3-4m × 6cm; nitrogen-hydrogen atmosphere prevents oxidation.

papers_mined.title: Manufacturing Process Float Glass
papers_mined.note: Gravity-pulled flat; surface tension simultaneously smooths both sides.

papers_mined.title: Tin Bath Roof TC Float
